creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wen
Date: Sat Apr 21 08:20:53 UTC 2018
New revision: 467861
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/467861

Log:
  - Change naming scheme to solve conflict with devel/liblas
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - Remove CONFLICTS= liblas-1.8*
  - Order USES= before other USE cases
  - Patch several source files
